scripts.build:deploy: npm ci --no-audit --fund=false && npm run py:install && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build
scripts.build:deploy:max: npm ci --no-audit --fund=false --prefer-offline && npm run py:install:optional && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build
scripts.py:install:optional: sh -c 'if [ "${ENABLE_G4F:-1}" = "1" ]; then npm run py:install; else echo "Skipping Python deps (ENABLE_G4F!=1)"; fi'
scripts.release:deploy: npm run prisma:migrate:deploy || npm run prisma:push
